case_title: HAUGE, RODNEY VS TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUGE, RODNEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VINCENT HOTEL PARTNERSHIP, L.P. THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THE LIABILITY OF THE NAMED DEFENDANTS FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMED LOSSES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF EXHIBITS SENT TO VINCENT HOTEL PARTNERSHIP, L.P. RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
